name: go9_scale500
hypothesis: 100 iters (Fix D) only reaches 50% vs random. Need 500+ iters with proven Fix D config (window buffer, constant LR, 5 epochs) to reach GnuGo L1 level.
success_criteria: >90% vs random by iter 200, loss continuing to decrease. Kill early if loss plateaus for 100 iters.
notes: Fix D (100 iters) results: loss 3.06, value loss 0.26, 50% vs random, 0/10 vs GnuGo L1. eval_games=20 enabled to track play strength. W&B enabled.
